issues.description: Power boost should have duration 'DuringThisBattle' not 'EndOfBattle'. The text 'during this battle' specifies the power is active only while the battle is occurring.

Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and GiveDon action is incorrect. The DON!! cost is part of the Counter cost mechanic, not a separate triggered effect. This should not be represented as a second effect; the DON!! return is a cost of playing the card, not an additional action.
Rest action target should allow 'up to 1', implying optional selection. Current scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' may not properly reflect optionality.
